name: Rob Boldt East Bay School Of Golf
about: East Bay School of Golf is a premier indoor golf training facility offering expert instruction and advanced technology. Located in Lafayette, California, the venue specializes in personalized coaching from former PGA tour player Rob Boldt, utilizing a state-of-the-art TrackMan simulator to provide detailed swing analysis and precise feedback. The facility focuses on improving golf skills in a distraction-free environment, with options for both lessons and simulator rental. Services are tailored to various skill levels, from juniors to serious golfers, with packages available for individuals and groups seeking to enhance their game year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Former PGA tour player with 40+ years of experience providing personalized coaching
TrackMan simulator offers unmatched accuracy and detailed swing analysis
Distraction-free environment tailored to individual needs and skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art dual radar and camera system for precise swing and ball tracking

faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned; the website does not specify if outside food or drinks are allowed.

faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes; typical simulator play times vary but usually range from 1.5 to 2 hours.
